title: Patel v. Riverbend Grocers — premises liability slip-and-fall
relief_sought: Compensatory damages of $85,000 for medical expenses and lost wages
key_facts: On July 12, 2025 plaintiff slipped on a leaking refrigerator puddle in aisle 4 of defendant's store.
Store incident log shows a prior leak report from the same unit two days earlier with no repair ticket.
Surveillance video captured the puddle existing for at least 47 minutes before the fall.
